title: HashMap Lookup
description: Store and retrieve values from a dictionary-like HashMap.
problemStatement:
HashMaps map keys to values. Import `java.util.HashMap`. Create a map `users` (String key, Integer value). Add `"Bob": 101`. Print the value for key `"Bob"`.

**Expected Output:** `101`.
hints: Use `put(key, value)` to add and `get(key)` to retrieve.
